run.coverageWindow: 2026-07-15 00:00 PDT through 2026-07-16 morning PDT, with older items used only as carried-forward B.C. ledger context

tierChecks.contract: Daily full scan of new items
tierChecks.notes: APTN, Indigenous Watchdog and First Peoples Law carried the live national signal. Nunatsiaq, Ha-Shilth-Sa, CCIB, FNFA, FNFMB, FNMPC, Indigenous Clean Energy, FNTC and NACCA were checked for new economic or legal items. NationTalk/IBF pages showed no July 15-16 economic items in accessible page content. BCAFN page was blocked by verification interstitial.
First Peoples Law Report July 8-14 was used as discovery only. No Friday long-form rotation performed because today is Thursday.
Skipped for publication foundation because the live public-source signal was available from Indigenous-led newsroom and institutional sources.

Ha-Shilth-Sa had July 15 local/environment items but no verified economic, ownership, capital, procurement or regulatory development for placement. Nunatsiaq showed July 16 Inuit/northern public-service items, but none cleared the economic-materiality bar for this edition.

tierChecks.contract: Search label 'Nations Brief Sources' since prior run
tierChecks.notes: Label exists with 17 total messages and 11 unread. Search for label:"Nations Brief Sources" after:2026/7/15 -in:spam -in:trash returned no emails.

sourceFailuresAndGaps: BCAFN economic-development newsletter page returned a verification interstitial and could not be scanned directly.
Some NationTalk search queries returned no usable current-index results; accessible IBF page content was stale to June 30 for economic items.
The LNG Canada equity headline was treated as discovery only and excluded because the material transaction claim could not be verified against an accessible primary or independent report.
The local v1 archive had no prior dated editions, so the July 15 pilot was used only for style and anti-duplication context.

qualityGates.twoSourceVerificationForConsequentialCla: Applied where possible; single-source APTN/Canadian Press items are labelled reported unless supported by institutional context.
qualityGates.distinctionsBasedLanguage: Preserved First Nations-specific framing; Inuit and Métis not generalized into First Nations claims.
qualityGates.completedVsProposed: No proposal was described as completed; B.C. project files described as live or proposed where applicable.
qualityGates.bodySourceChips: None in HTML body; numbered references placed at bottom.
qualityGates.dateIntegrity: Every included article date checked; older B.C. items explicitly marked as ledger context rather than new developments.
qualityGates.visualIntegrity: HTML parser, source-reference and responsive CSS structure checks passed. Screenshot-based browser inspection was attempted but blocked by the app browser's local file URL policy.
